description.en: A BDSM-oriented 8-values style questionnaire with an entry gate, three scene-based bipolar scale questions per main axis, twelve broader scenario questions, four optional hidden specialty axes, role outcomes, and badges. All content assumes adult, informed, negotiated consent.
description.zh: 一个 BDSM 取向的 8values 风格问卷：包含入口筛选、每个主轴三个场景式双极量表题、十二个多选场景题、隐藏单极轴、徽章与最终角色结果。所有内容默认以成年人、知情同意、协商边界和事后照护为前提。

description.en: Preference for leading, commanding, and taking responsibility vs. yielding control and following.
description.zh: 偏好引导、命令、承担责任，或放下控制、跟随对方。

description.en: Enjoyment of giving, inflicting, or orchestrating consensual intensity vs. receiving and processing it.
description.zh: 偏好给予、制造或编排协商强度，或接收并体验这种强度。

description.en: Preference for formal rules, titles, and ritualized interactions vs. instinctual, non-verbal, predator/prey energy.
description.zh: 偏好称谓、规则、礼节和仪式化互动，或偏好本能、非语言、捕猎/猎物式能量。

description.en: Preference for enforcing structure and correcting disobedience vs. teasing, resisting, and provoking a reaction.
description.zh: 偏好执行结构、纠正违背，或用戏弄、抵抗、挑衅来引发反应。

description.en: Focus on caretaking, praise, and emotional safety vs. consensual humiliation, objectification, and harshness.
description.zh: 偏好照顾、夸奖和情绪安全，或协商好的羞辱、物化与强硬语气。

description.en: Preference for planned scenes, scripts, and negotiated steps vs. organic, improvised, fluid escalation.
description.zh: 偏好计划、脚本和协商好的步骤，或在边界内自然、流动地升级。

description.en: Centered on mind games, anticipation, and power exchange vs. tangible sensation, impact, and restraint.
description.zh: 偏好心理游戏、期待感和权力交换，或偏好真实触感、冲击和身体限制。

description.en: How deeply the dynamic extends into everyday life vs. staying reserved for designated scenes.
description.zh: 动态延伸到日常生活的程度，或只保留在明确的场景中。

description.en: Thrill from being perceived by consenting observers or witnessed in appropriate spaces.
description.zh: 在合适空间中被同意的旁观者看见、展示或见证时获得的兴奋感。

description.en: Interest in consensual pet, creature, object, doll, or furniture-like headspaces.
description.zh: 对宠物、兽态、物件、娃娃、家具或工具化身份空间的兴趣。

description.en: Arousal and headspace tied to specific materials, textures, clothing, or gear.
description.zh: 兴奋和入戏感与特定材质、纹理、服装或装备的联系程度。

description.en: Interest in fear, CNC fantasy, and intense limits while preserving explicit consent, negotiation, and safewords.
description.zh: 对恐惧、CNC 幻想和高强度边界的兴趣，同时保留明确同意、协商和安全词。

text.en: In a clearly consensual adult scene, how much does the idea of negotiated power exchange, restraint, ritual, or controlled intensity interest you?
text.zh: 在明确同意的成人场景中，协商好的权力交换、束缚、仪式或可控强度，对你有多大吸引力？

label.en: Not interested at all
label.zh: 完全不感兴趣

label.en: Mostly not interested
label.zh: 大多不感兴趣

label.en: Unsure / neutral
label.zh: 不确定 / 中立

label.en: Curious with limits
label.zh: 有边界地好奇

label.en: Interested
label.zh: 感兴趣

label.en: Strongly interested
label.zh: 强烈感兴趣

text.en: At the start of a private scene, one partner kneels beside the bed while the other sets the rules for the next hour. Which position feels closer to you: being the one who sets the pace, or yielding to that lead?
text.zh: 私人场景开始时，一个人跪在床边，另一个人为接下来一小时设定规则。哪一边更接近你：制定节奏，还是顺从对方的引导？

text.en: During a rope-and-commands scene, one person watches breathing, comfort, and pacing while the other gets to stop deciding and simply follow. Which responsibility feels more like you: carrying the scene, or being relieved of control?
text.zh: 在绳缚与命令的场景中，一方关注呼吸、舒适度和节奏，另一方可以停止做决定、只需跟随。哪种责任更像你：承载整个场景，还是放下控制？

text.en: In a hotel-room scene after negotiation, one partner gives calm instructions about when to move, speak, or touch; the other waits for permission. Which side pulls you more: giving commands, or receiving them?
text.zh: 在协商后的酒店房间场景里，一方平静地指示什么时候移动、说话或触碰；另一方等待许可。哪一边更吸引你：发出命令，还是接收命令？

text.en: In an impact-play scene with a warm-up, check-ins, and agreed limits, one person chooses the rhythm and intensity while the other receives the sensations. Which side feels closer: orchestrating intensity, or receiving it?
text.zh: 在包含热身、确认和约定边界的冲击玩法中，一方选择节奏与强度，另一方接收感官刺激。哪边更接近你：编排强度，还是接收强度？

text.en: A partner offers their back or thighs for a negotiated sequence of thuds, stings, pauses, and touch. Which part of that scene attracts you more: creating the sensations, or receiving and processing them?
text.zh: 伴侣把背部或大腿交给一段协商好的闷击、刺痛、停顿与抚触序列。这个场景中哪部分更吸引你：制造感觉，还是接收并消化它？

text.en: In a candle-and-temperature-play setup using body-safe materials, one person controls distance, timing, and contrast while the other reacts. Which role fits you better: directing the sensation, or processing it in your own body?
text.zh: 在使用身体安全材料的蜡烛与温度玩法中，一方控制距离、时机和反差，另一方做出反应。哪个角色更适合你：引导感官，还是在身体里处理它？

text.en: At a private dinner-before-play scene, one partner uses titles, posture, and formal permission; later the same scene could turn into growls, stalking, and rough instinct. Which atmosphere draws you more: protocol, or primal?
text.zh: 在一场私密的餐前玩法中，一方使用称谓、姿势和正式许可；之后同一场景也可能转为低吼、跟踪和粗粝本能。哪种氛围更吸引你：礼仪规训，还是原始本能？

text.en: In a living-room scene, the evening can begin with a collar presented on a tray and exact etiquette, or with a silent chase around the furniture after one look. Which feels more immersive: formal ritual, or instinctive energy?
text.zh: 在客厅场景中，夜晚可以从托盘上的项圈和精确礼节开始，也可以从一个眼神后的无声追逐开始。哪种更让你入戏：正式仪式，还是本能能量？

text.en: In a dungeon room, one scene follows a written order of service with positions and commands, while another becomes breathy pursuit, wrestling, and feral momentum. Which structure fits you better: formal order, or feral momentum?
text.zh: 在地牢房间里，一种场景按照服务顺序、姿势和命令进行；另一种变成喘息的追逐、摔抱和野性推进。哪种结构更适合你：正式秩序，还是野性推进？

text.en: Someone forgets a rule during a kneeling-and-service scene. One response is a calm correction with consequences; another is a teasing smirk meant to provoke a reaction. Which side feels more like your energy: correcting, or provoking?
text.zh: 有人在跪姿服务场景中忘记了一条规则。一种回应是平静纠正并给出后果；另一种是带着挑衅意味的坏笑。哪一边更像你的能量：纠正，还是挑衅？

text.en: In a chore-and-reward scene, one person insists the task be done exactly right; the other deliberately does it almost right to see what happens. Which role is more fun: enforcing, or resisting?
text.zh: 在家务与奖励场景中，一方坚持任务必须完全正确；另一方故意“差一点正确”来看看会发生什么。哪个角色更有趣：执行规则，还是故意抵抗？

text.en: At a play party with negotiated rules, a partner either keeps score and holds the other accountable, or breaks tiny rules with a grin to invite pursuit. Which dynamic attracts you more: holding accountable, or breaking playfully?
text.zh: 在有协商规则的成人聚会上，伴侣要么记分并让对方承担责任，要么带着笑意破坏小规则来邀请追逐。哪种动态更吸引你：追责，还是玩闹破规？

text.en: In a restraint scene after a difficult day, one version centers soft praise, pet names, and reassurance; another uses consensual harsh words and humiliation as the spark. Which tone feels more powerful: nurturing, or degrading?
text.zh: 在艰难一天后的束缚场景中，一种版本以温柔夸奖、昵称和安抚为核心；另一种用协商好的严厉词语和羞辱点燃火花。哪种语气更有力量：照护，还是贬抑？

text.en: During a mirror scene, one partner could be admired and gently steadied, or made to blush through negotiated mockery and objectifying language. Which tone pulls you more: gentle safety, or harsh charge?
text.zh: 在镜子场景中，一方可以被欣赏并温柔稳住，也可以通过协商好的嘲弄和物化语言被弄得脸红。哪种语气更吸引你：温柔安全，还是强烈 harsh 感？

text.en: After a scene edges into tears or trembling, the emotional core could be caretaking and repair, or cruelty play that is tightly contained by consent and aftercare. Which side feels closer: caretaking, or cruelty play?
text.zh: 场景推进到落泪或颤抖后，情绪核心可以是照护与修复，也可以是在同意和事后照护中被牢牢包住的残酷扮演。哪一边更接近你：照护，还是残酷扮演？

text.en: Before a weekend scene, one plan includes a written sequence, exact outfits, music cues, and agreed steps; the other starts with only boundaries and follows the chemistry. Which execution style fits you: planned ritual, or improvised flow?
text.zh: 周末场景前，一种计划包含书面流程、指定服装、音乐提示和约定步骤；另一种只设边界，然后跟随化学反应。哪种执行方式更适合你：计划仪式，还是即兴流动？

text.en: A partner has negotiated a surprise scene: either you know the major beats in advance, or you know only the limits and let the moment unfold. Which feels better: scripted, or spontaneous?
text.zh: 伴侣协商了一场惊喜玩法：你要么提前知道主要节点，要么只知道边界并让当下展开。哪种更好：有脚本，还是自发？

text.en: The room is being prepared: candles, cuffs, clothing, and roles are arranged like a ceremony, or the tension snaps and the scene starts right where you are. Which opening excites you more: ritual setup, or jumping in?
text.zh: 房间正在准备：蜡烛、手铐、服装和角色像仪式一样摆好；或者张力突然点燃，场景就在原地开始。哪种开场更兴奋：仪式布置，还是直接进入？

text.en: In a locked-door scene with no restraints yet applied, the intensity comes either from permission, denial, and anticipation, or from the first tangible grip, cuff, or impact. Which focus matters more: mind-centered, or body-centered?
text.zh: 在一场门已锁但尚未使用束缚的场景里，强度要么来自许可、拒绝和期待，要么来自第一次真实的抓握、手铐或冲击。哪种焦点更重要：心理中心，还是身体中心？

text.en: During a chair scene, one version uses commands, silence, and uncertainty to create pressure; another uses rope, leather cuffs, weight, and controlled touch. Which play style draws you more: mental play, or physical play?
text.zh: 在椅子场景中，一种版本用命令、沉默和不确定性制造压力；另一种用绳子、皮革手铐、重量和可控触摸。哪种玩法更吸引你：心理玩法，还是身体玩法？

text.en: In a fantasy-only haunted-house roleplay, the scare is either psychological suspense and vulnerability, or direct sensations like pressure, restraint, and impact. Which core experience draws you more: psychological, or physical?
text.zh: 在纯幻想的鬼屋角色扮演中，惊吓要么来自心理悬念和脆弱感，要么来自压力、束缚、冲击等直接感受。哪种核心体验更吸引你：心理，还是身体？

text.en: Outside the bedroom, one dynamic includes small daily permissions, rituals, or service habits; another exists only when a planned scene begins. Which boundary fits you: lifestyle, or scene-only?
text.zh: 在卧室之外，一种动态包含小型日常许可、仪式或服务习惯；另一种只在计划好的场景开始时存在。哪种边界适合你：生活化，还是只限场景？

text.en: After a scene ends, one couple keeps a softer version of the dynamic through the evening, while another deliberately switches back to equal ordinary mode. Which do you prefer: everyday bleed, or strict container?
text.zh: 场景结束后，一对伴侣会把柔化版本的动态延续到晚上；另一对则刻意切回平等日常模式。你更喜欢哪种：日常渗透，还是严格容器？

text.en: On a normal workday, a dynamic could include a discreet morning ritual and evening check-in, or save all protocol for a booked private scene. Which feels more meaningful: daily ritual, or scene boundary?
text.zh: 普通工作日里，一个动态可能包含隐秘的早晨仪式和晚间 check-in；也可能把所有规训都留给预约好的私密场景。哪种更有意义：日常仪式，还是场景边界？

text.en: A partner arrives and asks, 'What happens now?' Which details fit your fantasy?
text.zh: 伴侣到达后问：“现在会发生什么？”哪些细节符合你的幻想？

label.en: I decide the order of events and give calm instructions
label.zh: 我决定事件顺序，并平静地下达指令

label.en: I wait for permission before moving or speaking
label.zh: 我在移动或说话前等待许可

label.en: We negotiate who leads this time before starting
label.zh: 开始前我们协商这次由谁主导

label.en: The scene includes being subtly witnessed by consenting others
label.zh: 场景包含被同意的他人微妙见证

label.en: The lead offers a collar or symbolic marker for the scene, and the other person chooses whether to accept it
label.zh: 主导方为场景提供项圈或象征标记，另一方选择是否接受

label.en: Before any control starts, both people pause to confirm safewords, exits, and aftercare needs
label.zh: 任何控制开始前，双方暂停确认安全词、退出方式和事后照护需求

text.en: In a prepared room, which elements pull you in?
text.zh: 在准备好的房间里，哪些元素吸引你？

label.en: I arrange restraints and monitor reactions
label.zh: 我安排束缚并观察反应

label.en: I am restrained and surrender movement
label.zh: 我被束缚并交出行动自由

label.en: Leather, latex, rope, or metal gear is a major part of the appeal
label.zh: 皮革、latex、绳子或金属装备是主要吸引点

label.en: I prefer no restraint in this scene
label.zh: 这个场景里我不想要束缚

label.en: One person directs posture, breathing, and where hands should stay without adding much pain
label.zh: 一方引导姿势、呼吸和双手位置，但不加入太多疼痛

label.en: A blindfold and careful touch make the body feel more alert than the restraint itself
label.zh: 眼罩和细致触摸让身体比束缚本身更敏锐

text.en: The scene begins at the doorway. What atmosphere feels hottest?
text.zh: 场景从门口开始。哪种氛围最让你兴奋？

label.en: Formal greeting, title, posture, and rules
label.zh: 正式问候、称谓、姿势和规则

label.en: Circling, chasing, growling, or predator/prey energy
label.zh: 绕行、追逐、低吼或捕猎/猎物能量

label.en: Dropping into pet, creature, or handler dynamics
label.zh: 进入宠物、生物或 handler 动态

label.en: Quiet eye contact and simple consent check-in
label.zh: 安静眼神接触和简单同意确认

label.en: Fantasy-only: a negotiated predator/prey chase through a rented private space
label.zh: 纯幻想：在租用的私人空间中进行协商好的捕猎/猎物追逐

label.en: A quiet service ritual: kneeling beside a table, waiting for a signal before speaking
label.zh: 安静的服务仪式：跪在桌边，等待信号后才说话

text.en: A rule is broken on purpose. What sounds fun?
text.zh: 有人故意破坏一条规则。什么听起来有趣？

label.en: I correct it with structure and consequences
label.zh: 我用结构和后果来纠正

label.en: I smirk and push once more to earn a reaction
label.zh: 我坏笑着再推一次，换取反应

label.en: We keep it playful and low-stakes
label.zh: 我们保持轻松玩闹、低风险

label.en: The correction happens where trusted consenting friends can see
label.zh: 纠正在可信且同意的朋友能看见的地方发生

label.en: A playful reward-and-penalty chart tracks tasks, teasing, and earned privileges
label.zh: 玩闹的奖惩表记录任务、挑衅和赢得的特权

label.en: The “punishment” begins with laughter, mock escape, and being caught on purpose
label.zh: “惩罚”从笑声、假装逃跑和故意被抓住开始

text.en: After a heavy moment, what tone do you crave?
text.zh: 经历一个沉重时刻后，你渴望什么语气？

label.en: Praise, water, blankets, and reassurance
label.zh: 夸奖、水、毯子和安抚

label.en: Being called useful, owned, or object-like within negotiated limits
label.zh: 在协商边界内被称为有用、被拥有或物件化

label.en: A teasing debrief that keeps the power dynamic alive
label.zh: 带挑逗感的复盘，让权力动态继续发热

label.en: Quiet grounding without much language
label.zh: 不太说话的安静落地和拥抱

label.en: After the scene, both people debrief what landed well, what did not, and what should change next time
label.zh: 场景后双方复盘哪些有效、哪些无效、下次要改变什么

label.en: The scene language is harsh during play, but aftercare is warm, explicit, and reassuring
label.zh: 场景中语言很强硬，但事后照护温暖、明确且安抚

text.en: You have a free evening for a scene. What preparation appeals?
text.zh: 你有一个空闲夜晚可以玩一场。哪种准备方式吸引你？

label.en: A checklist, script, safewords, and staged progression
label.zh: 清单、脚本、安全词和分阶段推进

label.en: Start with a mood and let it evolve
label.zh: 从一种氛围开始，让它自然演变

label.en: Specific outfit, hood, gloves, boots, or texture is essential
label.zh: 特定服装、头套、手套、靴子或纹理必不可少

label.en: A serious risk-aware negotiation before a darker fantasy
label.zh: 在更黑暗幻想前进行严肃的风险知情协商

label.en: A menu of pre-approved activities is drawn from a box, so surprise stays inside negotiated limits
label.zh: 从预先批准的活动卡片中抽取，让惊喜保持在协商边界内

label.en: The room is transformed with lighting, music, and laid-out tools before anyone enters headspace
label.zh: 在任何人进入状态前，用灯光、音乐和摆好的工具重塑房间

text.en: Which scene premise fits best?
text.zh: 哪种场景前提最适合你？

label.en: Permission, denial, fear, or obedience does most of the work
label.zh: 许可、拒绝、恐惧或服从承担了主要刺激

label.en: Impact, pressure, restraint, or texture does most of the work
label.zh: 冲击、压力、束缚或纹理承担了主要刺激

label.en: A consensual non-consent fantasy with clear negotiation and safewords
label.zh: 带有清晰协商和安全词的 CNC 幻想

label.en: The feel and smell of gear/material matters as much as the action
label.zh: 装备/材质的触感和气味与动作同样重要

label.en: A slow countdown, whispered instructions, and suspense matter more than the eventual touch
label.zh: 缓慢倒数、低声指令和悬念比最终触碰更重要

label.en: A steady rhythm of impact, pauses, and pressure creates the main charge
label.zh: 稳定的冲击、停顿和压力节奏制造主要张力

text.en: Outside the bedroom, which extensions sound appealing?
text.zh: 卧室之外，哪些延伸听起来有吸引力？

label.en: Small daily rules, titles, or service rituals
label.zh: 小型日常规则、称谓或服务仪式

label.en: No bleed-over; scenes start and end clearly
label.zh: 不延伸；场景清晰开始，也清晰结束

label.en: Temporary pet/object role in private domestic moments
label.zh: 在私密日常时刻临时进入宠物/物件角色

label.en: Keep everything casual until explicitly negotiated
label.zh: 一切保持随意，直到明确协商

label.en: A simple daily rule, such as asking permission before a treat, feels grounding rather than intrusive
label.zh: 一个简单日常规则，例如吃点心前请求许可，会让人安定而非被打扰

label.en: All collars, toys, and titles go back into a box when the scene ends
label.zh: 场景结束时，所有项圈、玩具和称谓都放回盒子里

text.en: In a kink event or dungeon, what attracts you?
text.zh: 在 kink 活动或地牢中，什么吸引你？

label.en: Watching other consenting adults scene respectfully
label.zh: 尊重地观看其他同意成年人进行场景

label.en: Being watched or displayed by consenting observers
label.zh: 被同意的旁观者观看或展示

label.en: Only private rooms or one-on-one scenes
label.zh: 只选择私人房间或一对一场景

label.en: Formal etiquette, collars, titles, and house rules
label.zh: 正式礼节、项圈、称谓和场地规则

label.en: Helping with a vetted demo in front of others feels exciting because it is structured and witnessed
label.zh: 在他人面前协助经过筛选的演示，因为它有结构且被见证

label.en: The public part is fun, but the emotional landing needs a private aftercare corner
label.zh: 公开部分很有趣，但情绪落地需要私密的事后照护角落

text.en: Which role-shift premise intrigues you?
text.zh: 哪种角色转变前提让你感兴趣？

label.en: Pet, handler, leash, crate, or training language
label.zh: 宠物、handler、牵引绳、笼子或训练语言

label.en: Doll, furniture, statue, drone, or useful-object headspace
label.zh: 娃娃、家具、雕像、无人机或有用物件状态

label.en: I prefer staying fully human and conversational
label.zh: 我更喜欢保持完全人类和可对话

label.en: Feral creature or prey/predator energy
label.zh: 野性生物或猎物/捕食者能量

label.en: Fantasy-only: spending part of a scene as a creature in a nest, communicating mostly through movement
label.zh: 纯幻想：场景中有一段时间作为巢穴里的生物，主要用动作交流

label.en: Being posed as a decorative object feels interesting only when time limits and check-ins are clear
label.zh: 被摆成装饰物只有在时间限制和 check-in 清楚时才有意思

text.en: Which object detail changes the whole scene?
text.zh: 哪种物件细节会改变整个场景？

label.en: Latex, rubber, leather, nylon, or uniforms unlock the headspace
label.zh: latex、橡胶、皮革、尼龙或制服开启状态

label.en: Cuffs, rope, collars, hoods, or restraints are central
label.zh: 手铐、绳子、项圈、头套或束缚工具是核心

label.en: No special gear; the dynamic is enough
label.zh: 不需要特殊装备；动态本身就足够

label.en: The outfit matters partly because someone might see it
label.zh: 服装重要，部分原因是可能被别人看见

label.en: A specific texture against skin is what flips the mental switch into scene space
label.zh: 皮肤上的特定纹理是切换进场景状态的开关

label.en: Slowly dressing or dressing someone else in gear is part of the scene, not preparation before it
label.zh: 慢慢穿上装备或给别人穿装备是场景的一部分，不是前期准备

text.en: Which darker-fantasy frame is closest to your interest?
text.zh: 哪种黑暗幻想框架最接近你的兴趣？

label.en: I prefer scenes without fear or risk-play themes
label.zh: 我更喜欢没有恐惧或风险主题的场景

label.en: A scripted CNC-style fantasy with explicit negotiation
label.zh: 带明确协商的脚本式 CNC 幻想

label.en: Fear, chase, capture, or interrogation energy
label.zh: 恐惧、追逐、捕获或审讯能量

label.en: Exploring limits carefully, with aftercare and hard boundaries
label.zh: 在事后照护和硬边界下谨慎探索极限

label.en: Fantasy-only: a haunted-house style interrogation or capture scene with pre-set exits and recovery time
label.zh: 纯幻想：带预设出口和恢复时间的鬼屋式审讯或捕获场景

label.en: I might enjoy intensity, but not surprise fear; I want clear previews before anything happens
label.zh: 我可能享受强度，但不喜欢突然恐惧；任何事发生前我想要清晰预告

text.en: At a vetted private dungeon night, a negotiated scene might happen behind a closed door, or in view of consenting attendees. Which privacy level fits you better: strictly private, or being seen?
text.zh: 在经过筛选的私人地牢之夜，协商好的场景可以在关门后进行，也可以在同意旁观者视线内进行。哪种私密程度更适合你：严格私密，还是被看见？

text.en: In a venue with consenting observers, what part feels charged?
text.zh: 在有同意旁观者的场地中，哪一部分带电？

label.en: Being displayed, posed, or presented
label.zh: 被展示、摆放或呈现

label.en: Displaying a partner with pride and control
label.zh: 带着骄傲和控制感展示伴侣

label.en: Watching respectfully from the edge
label.zh: 在边缘尊重地观看

label.en: Leaving for a private room
label.zh: 转去私人房间

label.en: A host or partner announces your role to a consenting room before the scene starts
label.zh: 场景开始前，主持人或伴侣向同意的房间宣布你的角色

label.en: Being partly hidden but still noticed, like behind a screen or in dim light, feels more appealing than full display
label.zh: 部分隐藏但仍被注意到，例如在屏风后或昏暗灯光里，比完全展示更吸引人

text.en: Which visibility level fits best?
text.zh: 哪种可见程度最适合你？

label.en: Only behind closed doors
label.zh: 只在关门之后

label.en: Subtle hints in appropriate adult spaces
label.zh: 在合适成人空间里的微妙暗示

label.en: Dungeon/event visibility with consent
label.zh: 在有同意规则的地牢/活动中可见

label.en: A deliberate performance energy
label.zh: 刻意的表演感

label.en: A private, consent-confirmed photo or written scene report shared with trusted people feels exciting
label.zh: 经过确认同意的私密照片或文字场景报告，分享给可信的人，会让人兴奋

label.en: Being seen could be acceptable, but recording or posting would break the mood completely
label.zh: 被看见也许可以，但录制或发布会彻底破坏氛围

text.en: In a pet-play scene at home, one partner stays fully in ordinary human identity, while another curls into creature headspace with gestures, sounds, and handling. Which state feels closer: human identity, or creature/pet?
text.zh: 在家中的宠物玩法里，一方保持普通人类身份，另一方进入用动作、声音和被处理方式表达的生物状态。哪种状态更接近你：人类身份，还是生物/宠物？

text.en: Which identity-shift role has pull?
text.zh: 哪种身份转变角色有吸引力？

label.en: Pet or creature
label.zh: 宠物或生物

label.en: Doll or mannequin
label.zh: 娃娃或人体模特

label.en: Furniture or useful object
label.zh: 家具或有用物件

label.en: Stay fully human
label.zh: 保持完全人类

label.en: Becoming a quiet mannequin or display figure is more compelling than acting like a pet
label.zh: 成为安静的人体模特或展示形象，比扮宠物更有吸引力

label.en: Fantasy-only: a masked creature state where normal speech is replaced by signals
label.zh: 纯幻想：戴面具的生物状态，用信号替代正常语言

text.en: What makes the role work?
text.zh: 是什么让这个角色成立？

label.en: Training, commands, and rewards
label.zh: 训练、命令和奖励

label.en: Reduced speech and simplified responses
label.zh: 减少语言和简化回应

label.en: Mask, hood, ears, tail, or uniform
label.zh: 面具、头套、耳朵、尾巴或制服

label.en: Affectionate caretaking while in role
label.zh: 角色中带有亲密照护

label.en: A handler uses simple cues, rewards, and repeated motions to build a temporary non-human headspace
label.zh: handler 用简单提示、奖励和重复动作建立临时非人状态

label.en: A clear reset phrase instantly returns everyone to normal names, voices, and check-ins
label.zh: 清晰的重置短语能立刻让所有人回到正常称呼、声音和 check-in

text.en: A scene is planned around either the emotional dynamic alone, or the feel and look of latex, leather, nylon, rubber, rope, or metal. Which is closer for you: optional texture, or essential material?
text.zh: 一场场景可以只围绕情感动态，也可以围绕 latex、皮革、尼龙、橡胶、绳子或金属的触感和视觉展开。哪种更接近你：纹理可有可无，还是材质必不可少？

text.en: Which material detail matters most?
text.zh: 哪种材质细节最重要？

label.en: Latex/rubber shine and compression
label.zh: latex/橡胶的光泽和包覆感

label.en: Leather structure, scent, and authority
label.zh: 皮革的结构、气味和权威感

label.en: Nylon, stockings, gloves, or uniform texture
label.zh: 尼龙、丝袜、手套或制服纹理

label.en: Rope, cuffs, metal, or restraint hardware
label.zh: 绳子、手铐、金属或束缚五金

label.en: Layering gloves, boots, masks, or slick fabric is the point of the scene, not decoration
label.zh: 叠加手套、靴子、面具或光滑面料是场景重点，而非装饰

label.en: The sound of leather, latex, chains, or zippers is part of what turns the scene on
label.zh: 皮革、latex、链条或拉链的声音也是场景启动的一部分

text.en: How required is the object or outfit?
text.zh: 物件或服装有多必要？

label.en: Nice but optional
label.zh: 很好，但可有可无

label.en: It strongly boosts the scene
label.zh: 它会强烈增强场景

label.en: It unlocks the headspace
label.zh: 它能开启入戏状态

label.en: The dynamic matters more than any object
label.zh: 动态比任何物件都重要

label.en: Even one small item, like gloves or a collar, is enough to unlock the mood
label.zh: 哪怕一个小物件，如手套或项圈，也足以开启氛围

label.en: The scene only feels complete after a full visual transformation into gear or uniform
label.zh: 只有完全变换成装备或制服视觉后，场景才算完整

text.en: In a negotiated abduction-roleplay fantasy at home, the real safety plan is solid, but the scene creates suspense and fear. Which intensity fits you better: no fear play, or fear play?
text.zh: 在家中协商好的“绑架”角色扮演幻想里，现实安全计划很稳固，但场景制造悬念和恐惧。哪种强度更适合你：不玩恐惧，还是恐惧玩法？

text.en: Which dark-scene frame fits?
text.zh: 哪种黑暗场景框架适合你？

label.en: Interrogation, fear, or capture fantasy with negotiated limits
label.zh: 带协商边界的审讯、恐惧或捕获幻想

label.en: CNC roleplay with explicit pre-consent and safewords
label.zh: 带明确预先同意和安全词的 CNC 角色扮演

label.en: Extreme sensation only after careful risk negotiation
label.zh: 只有在谨慎风险协商后才进行极端感官强度

label.en: No darker frame
label.zh: 不需要黑暗框架

label.en: Fantasy-only: a written note or recorded instruction creates fear without needing real unpredictability
label.zh: 纯幻想：一张字条或录音指令制造恐惧，而不需要真正不可预测

label.en: The darker the fantasy gets, the more I want explicit stoplight check-ins underneath it
label.zh: 幻想越黑暗，我越想在底层保留明确的红黄绿 check-in

text.en: What safety structure still feels compatible with the fantasy?
text.zh: 什么安全结构仍然能和幻想兼容？

label.en: A script with check-ins built into the roleplay
label.zh: 把 check-in 写进角色扮演的脚本

label.en: Clear safewords or traffic-light signals
label.zh: 清晰的安全词或红黄绿信号

label.en: Detailed aftercare and decompression plan
label.zh: 详细的事后照护和降落计划

label.en: I would not do this without strong safety structure
label.zh: 没有强安全结构我不会做这类玩法

label.en: Rehearsing the scary parts first makes the later fantasy feel safer and more intense
label.zh: 先排练恐怖部分，会让之后的幻想更安全也更强烈

label.en: A detailed after-action review is part of the appeal after pushing boundaries
label.zh: 推动边界后的详细复盘本身也有吸引力

description.en: Your strongest pattern combines material fixation with identity-shift fantasy: the object, suit, mask, texture, or uniform is not decoration but the doorway into headspace. You are drawn to scenes where individuality softens into role, function, polish, or obedience. The ideal dynamic is highly negotiated, aesthetically exact, and immersive enough to feel transformative while still keeping clear boundaries and aftercare outside the persona.
description.zh: 你的结果把材质恋物与非人化身份空间结合在一起。光泽、包覆、统一外观、被编码成“工具”或“装置”的感觉，可能比普通角色扮演更能让你入戏。最适合你的场景需要非常清晰的时间限制、退出词和事后重新人化。

description.en: You are the person who builds the atmosphere through objects: gloves, boots, latex, leather, restraints, collars, uniforms, scent, shine, and ritualized handling. Your turn-on is not only what happens, but how every material cue frames power and anticipation. You likely enjoy selecting, arranging, maintaining, and using gear as a language of control, care, display, and psychological precision.
description.zh: 你的兴奋点常常由物件、材质和装备结构点燃。你可能喜欢设计服装、准备工具、调整纹理和仪式化穿戴，让场景像被精心制作出来。动态本身重要，但材料是打开状态的钥匙。

description.en: You are energized when gear, presentation, and being witnessed intersect. The thrill comes from becoming a curated image: dressed, posed, inspected, or admired under conditions you chose beforehand. This role is not simply exhibitionism; it is performance through materials. Your best scenes use consent-aware audiences, clear privacy limits, and enough staging to make the visual transformation feel intentional rather than accidental.
description.zh: 你对材质与可见性都有明显反应：被看见、被展示，或让装备在合适空间中被注视，会增强场景张力。你适合有明确同意、清晰边界和无记录规则的展示式玩法。

description.en: Specific textures, garments, restraints, and tools appear to be central catalysts for you. You may not need an elaborate hierarchy or extreme scene; the right material can carry the emotional charge by itself. You are likely happiest when partners treat gear seriously, understand sensory details, and give you time to enter the aesthetic, tactile, or symbolic state that makes the scene feel complete.
description.zh: 你对 latex、皮革、尼龙、绳子、金属或制服的触感、气味、声音和视觉细节高度敏感。它们不是普通装饰，而是进入 headspace 的语言。你可能会更重视准备、穿戴和保养这些物件的过程。

description.en: Your answers point toward identity-shift on the receiving side: pet, creature, doll, furniture, mannequin, or another non-ordinary state where human social performance falls away. The appeal is not just submission, but relief from ordinary personhood. Strong negotiation matters here because the scene works best when the role is immersive, consistent, and respected, while your off-scene needs and dignity remain protected.
description.zh: 你被暂时放下普通人类身份的体验吸引：宠物、兽态、巢穴、面具、动作信号或非语言回应。这个结果强调接收和沉浸，而不是日常逃避。安全的 reset 词、温柔照护和结束后的重新命名会很重要。

description.en: You are drawn to guiding someone through a non-human or object-like headspace. Your role is part trainer, part caretaker, part stage director: setting rules, reading body language, giving simple cues, and keeping the fantasy coherent. The strength of this profile is containment. You create a world where the other person can become less verbal or less human-coded without becoming unsafe, unseen, or neglected.
description.zh: 你可能享受引导别人进入宠物、兽态、娃娃或物件状态：用提示、奖励、节奏和照护让对方进入临时身份。好的 handler 不是随意支配，而是观察、校准并在结束后把人安全带回普通状态。

description.en: You are interested in fear, helplessness, taboo, or loss-of-control fantasies, but your best version of this role is not reckless. It is intensely negotiated danger-theatre: limits discussed beforehand, signals understood, and aftercare treated as part of the scene rather than a repair job. You may enjoy CNC, chase, interrogation, or ordeal fantasies when they feel convincing enough to bypass ordinary politeness while still being consensual underneath.
description.zh: 你对黑暗幻想、恐惧或 CNC 框架有兴趣，但核心仍是协商与结构。你可能喜欢在安全计划稳固时体验失控的幻觉。你的最佳场景会把安全词、退出、预演和 aftercare 做得非常清楚。

description.en: You are drawn to orchestrating scenes that feel risky, frightening, or morally charged while remaining carefully bounded. Your talent is creating the illusion of danger without abandoning responsibility. You may prefer CNC frameworks, fear play, threat language, or severe psychological pressure, but the core of the role is calibration: knowing the partner, preparing exits, and making intensity feel inevitable rather than chaotic.
description.zh: 你被强烈边界、恐惧、捕获或审讯幻想吸引，但更像导演而不是莽撞冒险者。你想设计危险的“感觉”，同时把现实风险控制住。这个角色需要高沟通能力、风险知情和认真复盘。

description.en: Being seen is part of the charge for you. You may enjoy being posed, displayed, admired, corrected in public-adjacent spaces, or included in vetted group dynamics where the audience becomes part of the power exchange. The best version of this role is selective rather than careless: you need strong privacy rules, trusted witnesses, and a partner who understands that exposure should heighten consent, not replace it.
description.zh: 你可能喜欢被摆放、呈现、观看或以仪式化方式成为焦点。展示对你来说不只是暴露，而是一种被框定、被欣赏、被赋予意义的状态。明确的观众同意和无记录规则会让体验更安全。

description.en: You enjoy managing the social field of a scene: who sees, who is allowed close, when a partner is displayed, and how attention becomes pressure. This is a dominant-leaning exhibition profile focused on staging and control. Your strength is turning an audience into a negotiated prop, never an uncontrolled risk. You likely value etiquette, discretion, and confidence in public or semi-public kink spaces.
description.zh: 你可能喜欢在同意旁观者面前带领、展示或管理一场场景。你享受结构、控场和被见证的张力。理想状态下，你既照顾被展示的人，也尊重场地礼仪与观众边界。

description.en: Your profile leans toward receiving tangible intensity: impact, restraint, pressure, exhaustion, or other body-centered sensations. You are not necessarily passive; you may be actively processing, enduring, displaying resilience, or chasing catharsis. The most satisfying scenes for you probably have clear warm-up, careful pacing, and a partner who understands that physical intensity is both sensation and communication.
description.zh: 你更偏向接收身体强度：冲击、压力、束缚、节奏和恢复过程可能让你进入状态。你并不只是“承受”，而是在身体里处理和转化刺激。好的场景需要热身、反馈和明确的落地照护。

description.en: You are drawn to the mental weather of submission: anticipation, fixation, fear, obedience, altered focus, and the feeling of being guided deeper into a role. Physical sensation may matter, but the real hook is psychological narrowing. The best scenes for you use voice, pacing, ritual, and expectation to create a trance-like arc, followed by grounding and reassurance when the headspace ends.
description.zh: 你倾向于通过心理压力、许可、等待、语言和注意力进入被引导状态。相比强烈身体刺激，悬念和服从感可能更能让你沉下去。你适合与能稳稳读懂反应、并清楚 debrief 的伙伴玩。

description.en: You are attracted to structure: titles, permissions, posture, service rules, rituals, and the calm certainty of knowing exactly what is expected. Your submission is likely clearest when the rules are elegant and consistent rather than improvised. You may thrive in scenes with formal openings, inspection, assigned tasks, and explicit standards, especially when correction feels purposeful rather than arbitrary.
description.zh: 称谓、姿势、许可、服务顺序和仪式会让你的顺从更真实。你可能喜欢被清楚地要求、被检查、被引导，而不是混乱地推进。结构对你来说不是束缚感，而是安全感和意义感。

description.en: Your submissive side is primal rather than polished. You may want to be chased, pinned, stalked, growled at, cornered, or overwhelmed by instinctual energy. Words and etiquette can matter less than breath, movement, resistance, and surrender. The safest version of this role uses strong pre-scene negotiation because the scene itself may deliberately feel less civilized, more animal, and more immediate.
description.zh: 你的顺从更偏原始：追逐、被抓住、身体语言、喘息和本能反应可能比正式称谓更吸引你。你喜欢在协商好的安全边界内体验“被捕获”的感觉。越是非语言的场景，越需要事前边界清楚。

description.en: You like tension, teasing, testing, and earning a reaction. Your submission may not look quiet: it may be witty, provocative, playful, and built around the question of whether someone can actually handle you. The best partner for this role does not confuse resistance with rejection. They set clear rules, enjoy the game, and know when to correct, reward, or laugh without losing control.
description.zh: 你被挑逗、抵抗、坏笑和被纠正之间的回路吸引。你的“不听话”更像邀请互动，而不是拒绝本身。适合你的关系需要明确区分真实拒绝与协商好的 brat 行为。

description.en: You are drawn to yielding inside a warm container. Praise, caretaking, protection, and emotional safety are not extras; they are what make power exchange feel possible. You may enjoy restraint, obedience, or service, but you likely need the dynamic to affirm that you are valued. Your ideal scenes mix authority with tenderness, and aftercare may feel like the emotional climax rather than the epilogue.
description.zh: 你的顺从与被照护、被夸奖、被稳住紧密相连。你可能喜欢交出控制，但更希望这种交出被温柔承接。你的理想场景可以很强烈，但情绪底色应当是安全、被珍惜和被看见。

description.en: Your profile suggests interest in degradation, objectification, teasing, or being reduced into a role, but not in a random or careless way. The charge comes from consensual harshness: names, positions, tasks, display, or embarrassment that has been negotiated as wanted. You likely need a partner who can be severe in-scene while still checking the larger emotional frame before and after.
description.zh: 你可能被协商好的羞辱、物化、宠物化或被使用感吸引，同时仍需要清晰的尊重和 aftercare。这个角色的关键不是被真正贬低，而是在安全关系中选择一种强烈的心理对比。

description.en: You are interested in dynamics that can extend beyond a single scene into habits, routines, service, rules, or daily authority. This does not necessarily mean constant intensity; it may mean small structures that keep the connection alive. Your best fit is a partner who can distinguish fantasy authority from real-life responsibility, building a lifestyle framework that supports both devotion and autonomy.
description.zh: 你对场景之外的规则、服务、许可、任务或日常仪式有兴趣。它可能让普通生活也带有动态感。这个结果需要成熟沟通，因为生活化动态必须可持续、可复盘、可重新协商。

description.en: You respond to planned arcs, repeated gestures, symbolic openings, collars, kneeling, inspections, written rules, or carefully sequenced scenes. Ritual helps you enter the submissive state by making the transition visible and meaningful. You probably prefer a partner who prepares rather than improvises everything, because predictability gives the scene weight and lets small deviations feel deliberate.
description.zh: 你喜欢用开场、姿势、衣着、称谓、项圈或固定语句进入顺从状态。仪式帮助你跨过现实与场景之间的门槛。你的最佳体验往往不是突然发生，而是被认真邀请和逐步带入。

description.en: You enjoy receiving or yielding in scenes that develop organically. You may prefer a partner who can read the room and escalate fluidly instead of following a rigid script. Your desire is responsive, atmospheric, and alive to surprise. The safest version still uses prior negotiation, but once the container is set, you like the feeling that the scene discovers itself in real time.
description.zh: 你更喜欢在协商边界内跟随当下化学反应，而不是完全照脚本。你可能享受突然的节奏变化、位置变化或情绪转弯。关键是先把边界说清楚，然后允许场景活起来。

description.en: You like bottoming or submissive experiences as defined events rather than as a constant identity. A scene may be intense, intimate, and meaningful, but you prefer it to have a beginning, middle, end, and return to ordinary equality afterward. This role suits people who value compartmentalization, explicit negotiation, and the freedom to enjoy power exchange without making it a full-time lifestyle.
description.zh: 你喜欢在明确开始和结束的容器里接收权力、强度或束缚。场景中可以很深，但结束后你更想回到普通平等。你适合清晰的协商、场中动态和事后复盘。

description.en: Your dominant energy is psychological. You are drawn to anticipation, rules, uncertainty, fear, obedience tests, controlled choices, and the careful use of language. Physical tools may be useful, but the real instrument is attention. Your strongest scenes likely make the other person feel guided, cornered, or read with uncanny accuracy while still being protected by clear negotiation and debriefing.
description.zh: 你的支配能量偏心理：期待、规则、不确定、恐惧、服从测试和语言控制很有吸引力。工具可以有用，但真正的工具是注意力。你最强的场景会让对方感到被读懂、被引导、被温柔地困住。

description.en: You are attracted to giving intensity and shaping how another person experiences it. This may include impact, endurance, predicament, restraint, or carefully managed discomfort. The word conductor fits because the role is not just inflicting; it is pacing, listening, building, pausing, and resolving. Your best scenes treat pain or intensity as a composed exchange rather than a blunt act.
description.zh: 你被给予强度和塑造对方体验所吸引，包括冲击、耐受、困境、束缚或可控不适。你不是只想“施加”，而是想编排节奏、倾听反馈、建立高潮和落点。

description.en: You prefer authority that is formal, deliberate, and ceremonially clear. Rules, titles, posture, inspection, service, and repeated openings help your dominance feel real. You may be less interested in chaotic escalation than in a scene that unfolds with dignity and control. Your ideal partner appreciates structure and understands that precision itself can be intimate.
description.zh: 你偏好正式、清晰、带仪式感的权威。规则、称谓、姿势、检查、服务和重复开场会让你的支配感成形。你可能比起混乱升级，更喜欢有尊严和控制感的展开。

description.en: Your profile combines authority with symbolism: collars, contracts, presentations, permissions, and rituals that make belonging feel visible. The term owner here is best understood as negotiated roleplay or relationship language, not a replacement for real-world autonomy. You likely want a dynamic that feels serious, aesthetic, and emotionally charged, with clear boundaries about where the role begins and ends.
description.zh: 你的结果把权威与象征结合在一起：项圈、契约、呈现、许可和归属感语言都可能很有力量。这里的 owner 指协商好的角色或关系语言，而不是现实自主权的替代。边界清楚会让它更深。

description.en: Your dominance is primal: pursuit, capture, pinning, growling, rough energy, and instinctive pressure may appeal more than titles or polished protocol. You probably enjoy scenes that feel physical, immediate, and animal-coded. The key to doing this well is strong pre-scene negotiation, because the in-scene mood may intentionally feel less verbal, less polite, and more predatory.
description.zh: 你的支配偏原始：追逐、捕获、压制、低吼、粗粝能量和本能压力可能比称谓更吸引你。你适合事前谈得很细、场中更少语言的玩法。协商越清楚，野性越安全。

description.en: You like structure, standards, consequences, and the satisfaction of seeing resistance become compliance. Your dominance is disciplinary rather than purely sadistic. You may enjoy rules, inspections, punishments, assignments, or brat-taming dynamics where the correction is part of the bond. The best version of this role is consistent, fair, and specific enough that discipline feels earned rather than random.
description.zh: 你喜欢结构、标准、后果，以及看到抵抗转为服从的满足感。你的支配更偏管教，而不只是施虐。公平、一致和具体，会让惩罚或纠正显得“应得”而非随机。

description.en: You lead through protection, praise, containment, and calm authority. Your dominance is not soft because it lacks power; it is powerful because it makes surrender feel safe. You may enjoy giving instructions, setting rules, or correcting gently, but the emotional tone is nurturing. Partners who need reassurance, caretaking, and secure attachment inside kink may find this role especially compelling.
description.zh: 你通过保护、夸奖、容器和稳定权威来引导。你的支配并不因为温柔而缺少力量；它的力量在于让 surrender 变得安全。你适合需要安抚、照护和安全依恋感的伙伴。

description.en: You are drawn to severe tone, degradation, objectification, and strict treatment, but your effective version depends on control rather than cruelty. You may enjoy making a partner feel used, reduced, embarrassed, or handled, provided those meanings were explicitly chosen. Your strongest scenes separate in-scene harshness from out-of-scene respect, using aftercare to restore clarity and connection.
description.zh: 你被严厉语气、贬抑、物化和严格对待吸引，但有效版本依赖控制而非真正残酷。你可能喜欢让伴侣在协商意义里感到被使用、被降低或被处理。事后尊重和照护会让强硬保持清晰。

description.en: You are interested in authority that persists beyond isolated scenes: routines, service expectations, permissions, task lists, rituals, or ongoing accountability. This role requires maturity because it touches real life. Your best dynamics make the everyday feel charged without becoming invasive, using periodic check-ins and renegotiation to keep authority consensual, sustainable, and useful.
description.zh: 你对超出单次场景的权威有兴趣：日常流程、服务期待、许可、任务列表、仪式或持续 accountability。这个角色触及真实生活，因此需要成熟和周期性复盘。好的动态应当有用、可持续且不侵入。

description.en: You lead by reading the moment. Rather than needing a full script, you enjoy improvising within negotiated limits: changing positions, altering tone, adding restraints, or following a partner’s reactions. Your strength is responsiveness. You likely value partners who trust your judgment once the boundaries are set and who enjoy scenes that feel alive rather than pre-choreographed.
description.zh: 你通过读取当下带领场景。你不一定需要完整脚本，而是喜欢在协商边界内根据反应变化姿势、语气、束缚或强度。你的优势是响应能力。

description.en: You enjoy topping or dominance as a bounded event. You may be very confident in-scene, but you prefer the dynamic to return to ordinary equality afterward. This role suits people who like clarity: negotiation before, authority during, debrief after. You may be excellent for partners who want intensity without ongoing hierarchy or lifestyle bleed-through.
description.zh: 你享受 topping 或支配作为一个有边界的事件。场景中你可以很自信，但结束后更喜欢回到普通平等。你适合想要强度但不想要持续等级关系的伙伴。

description.en: You can move between giving and receiving, but sensation is the center of gravity. You may enjoy impact, restraint, pressure, texture, or endurance from either side, depending on chemistry. Your scenes are strongest when the body is treated as a conversation: pacing, feedback, recovery, and escalation all matter. You are less boxed into a role than into a kind of intensity.
description.zh: 你可以在给予和接收之间移动，但身体感官是重心。冲击、束缚、压力、纹理或耐受都可能吸引你。你不像被固定在一个角色里，而更像被某种强度语言吸引。

description.en: You are flexible in power, but you are especially interested in orchestrating intensity. Sometimes that may mean giving pressure, pain, fear, or challenge; other times it may mean receiving it and testing yourself. You likely enjoy partners who can trade roles without losing seriousness. Your best dynamics name the direction of each scene clearly so the switch does not become confusion.
description.zh: 你在权力位置上很灵活，但特别在意强度的编排。有时你想给予压力、痛感、恐惧或挑战；有时你想接收它并测试自己。每场开始前明确方向，会让 switch 不变成混乱。

description.en: You can inhabit either side of power exchange, but formal structure is the anchor. Titles, permissions, service scripts, inspections, or ceremonial openings may help you switch cleanly between roles. You are likely drawn to partners who respect etiquette and detail. Whether leading or yielding, you want the scene to feel composed, intentional, and elegantly bounded.
description.zh: 你可以处在权力交换的任一边，但正式结构是锚点。称谓、许可、服务脚本、检查或仪式开场帮助你清楚切换角色。无论带领还是顺从，你都希望场景优雅且有边界。

description.en: Your range moves through instinct rather than protocol. You may chase or be chased, pin or be pinned, growl or surrender, depending on the energy in the room. The switch is not intellectual; it is animal, responsive, and physical. The best scenes for you negotiate hard beforehand so that in-scene behavior can feel raw without becoming unclear.
description.zh: 你的切换通过本能而非礼仪发生。你可以追逐或被追逐、压制或被压制、低吼或 surrender，取决于房间里的能量。最适合你的是事前谈清楚，场中让身体和本能说话。

description.en: You are drawn to back-and-forth power: teasing, bargaining, provoking, correcting, and laughing through tension. You may enjoy brat dynamics from either side, because the game is the point. Your ideal scenes have enough structure to keep the challenge meaningful and enough humor to keep it alive. Partners should understand that resistance can be an invitation, not a refusal, only when pre-negotiated.
description.zh: 你被来回拉扯的权力感吸引：调情式谈判、挑衅、纠正和笑声中的张力。你可能从 brat 或 tamer 的任一侧获得乐趣。结构让游戏有意义，幽默让它活着。

description.en: You can move between control and surrender, but you prefer the exchange to be orderly. You may enjoy discipline, service, rules, and consequences from either role, especially when expectations are explicit. This profile often suits people who like role clarity but do not want permanent role identity. You are at your best when the scene has a clean contract and a clean ending.
description.zh: 你可以在控制和 surrender 间移动，但偏好有秩序的交换。规则、服务、后果和明确期待能让两边都更成立。你适合喜欢角色清楚、但不想固定身份的人。

description.en: You can lead or yield, but emotional safety, praise, and care remain central. You may enjoy being protected as much as protecting, or giving aftercare as much as receiving it. The dynamic does not need to be mild; it just needs a warm container. You are likely drawn to partners who treat vulnerability as something to steward, not exploit.
description.zh: 你可以带领也可以顺从，但情绪安全、夸奖和照护始终居中。你可能既享受保护别人，也享受被保护。场景不一定温和，但需要一个温暖容器。

description.en: You are flexible with power and drawn to a sharper emotional palette: teasing, humiliation, rough praise, objectifying compliments, or controlled harshness. You may enjoy giving or receiving that tone, depending on the scene. Your best fit is a partner who can distinguish playful cruelty from actual contempt and who understands that the emotional contrast is the engine.
description.zh: 你在权力上灵活，并被更锋利的情绪色调吸引：挑逗、羞辱、粗暴夸奖、物化式赞美或可控 harsh 感。你需要能区分玩闹残酷与真实轻蔑的伙伴。

description.en: You may switch roles, but you are interested in dynamics that affect daily life: routines, service, check-ins, rules, privileges, or rituals. Rather than choosing one fixed rank forever, you might prefer negotiated seasons, contexts, or domains of authority. This role requires unusually clear communication because switching and lifestyle structure both need stable expectations.
description.zh: 你可能切换角色，但也对影响日常生活的动态感兴趣：流程、服务、check-in、规则、特权或仪式。相比永远固定等级，你也许更喜欢按季节、语境或领域协商权威。

description.en: You are flexible in role but anchored by ceremony. You may enjoy scripts, collars, formal invitations, scene openings, closing phrases, or repeated gestures that let everyone know the dynamic has begun. Ritual helps you cross the threshold into kink, no matter which side you occupy. Your best scenes feel crafted rather than accidental.
description.zh: 你在角色上灵活，但由仪式锚定。脚本、项圈、正式邀请、开场语、结束语或重复手势能让你进入状态。无论你站在哪一边，仪式都让场景像被精心制作。

description.en: You are flexible, responsive, and energized by organic escalation. You may enjoy not knowing whether you will end up leading, yielding, teasing, wrestling, or receiving intensity until the scene takes shape. This does not mean skipping negotiation; it means negotiating the playground first, then exploring it fluidly. Chemistry and moment-to-moment reading matter more than script fidelity.
description.zh: 你灵活、反应快，并被自然升级点燃。你可能直到场景展开才知道自己会带领、顺从、挑衅、摔抱或接收强度。重点不是跳过协商，而是先协商游乐场，再在其中自由探索。

description.en: You appear flexible across power roles, with no single pole dominating the whole profile. You may top, bottom, lead, follow, tease, serve, receive, or direct depending on partner, mood, and scene design. Your defining trait is calibration: noticing what the dynamic needs and moving there. Clear negotiation is especially useful because your range is broad enough that assumptions may misread you.
description.zh: 你的权力角色相当灵活，没有单一极端主导整个结果。你可以 top、bottom、带领、跟随、挑逗、服务、接收或引导，取决于伴侣、心情和场景设计。你的核心能力是校准。

description.en: Your answers suggest BDSM is not a meaningful erotic or romantic interest for you right now. That is a complete result, not a failure state: the safest and most self-aware choice is to skip dynamics that do not genuinely attract you. You may still appreciate trust, communication, or fantasy in ordinary intimacy, but this test should end here rather than pushing you into categories that do not fit.
description.zh: 你的答案显示 BDSM 目前并不是你有意义的情色或亲密兴趣。这是一个完整结果，不是失败状态：最安全、最自知的选择，就是跳过并不真正吸引你的动态。

description.en: You showed BDSM interest while selecting options that emphasize negotiation, aftercare, or clear containers.
description.zh: 你对 BDSM 有兴趣，同时选择了强调协商、事后照护或清晰容器的选项。

description.en: Specific materials, outfits, or gear appear to be an important catalyst for your headspace.
description.zh: 特定材质、服装或装备似乎是你进入状态的重要催化剂。

description.en: Material fetish and non-human/object headspace combine into a sleek, identity-shifted gear fantasy.
description.zh: 材质恋物与非人/物件化状态结合成光滑、身份转变式的装备幻想。

description.en: Being perceived by consenting observers seems to intensify the scene for you.
description.zh: 被同意的旁观者看见似乎会强化你的场景体验。

description.en: You kept visibility low and seem to prefer intimacy behind closed doors.
description.zh: 你保持较低可见度，似乎更偏好关门后的亲密空间。

description.en: Your answers point toward pet, creature, handler, or training headspaces.
description.zh: 你的答案指向宠物、生物、handler 或训练式身份空间。

description.en: You showed interest in useful-object, doll, furniture, statue, or drone-style identity shifts.
description.zh: 你表现出对有用物件、娃娃、家具、雕像或 drone 式身份转变的兴趣。

description.en: You are curious about darker fantasies, but your answers still keep consent and safety structure visible.
description.zh: 你对更黑暗幻想好奇，但答案仍保留了同意与安全结构。

description.en: Titles, etiquette, ritual, or service structure are a strong part of your scene language.
description.zh: 称谓、礼节、仪式或服务结构是你场景语言的重要部分。

description.en: Your atmosphere leans toward instinct, pursuit, body language, and feral energy.
description.zh: 你的氛围更偏向本能、追逐、身体语言和野性能量。

description.en: Your answers highlight the chemistry of provocation and correction.
description.zh: 你的答案突出了挑衅与纠正之间的化学反应。

description.en: Service and care seem to matter as emotional structure, not just performance.
description.zh: 服务和照护对你而言像情绪结构，而不仅是表演。

description.en: Psychological power exchange, suspense, and anticipation appear to outweigh pure physical sensation.
description.zh: 心理权力交换、悬念和期待感似乎比纯身体感官更重要。

description.en: Physical sensation, restraint, gear, and tangible intensity seem central to immersion.
description.zh: 身体感官、束缚、装备和可触摸强度似乎是你沉浸的核心。
